basic_details.job_title: BECIL Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL), Coastal Aquaculture Authority, Chennai
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.general_fee: Rs 295/- (Rupees Two Hundred Ninety Five only)

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Aquaculture or Zoology or Fisheries or Marine Biology
qualification.details: Senior Technical Assistant: Master's Degree in Aquaculture or Zoology or Fisheries or Marine Biology from a recognized University or Equivalent. A minimum 05 years' experience in the aquaculture field after acquiring the above-said essential qualification. Proficient in MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint. Good command over basic and advanced features of applications. Good communication, noting, and drafting letters in English.

selection_process: Applications received are shortlisted based on the meeting eligibility criteria's set and the confirmation of receipt of the DD for the application fees. Shortlisting for the interview shall be done as per the eligibility criteria and a merit list will be created for each post in a ratio of 1:25 for Senior Technical Assistant. Possession of the prescribed qualifications and experience does not automatically entitle a candidate to be shortlisted for further stages of the selection process. Preference may be accorded to candidates possessing higher marks in the prescribed qualifications and/or greater relevant experience
as per the discretion of the client (Principal Employer). The organization reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on higher qualifications

or other suitable criteria as deemed fit. The list of all the shortlisted applicants shall be forwarded to the client for further selection at their end. Shortlisted Applicants shall be informed via email for their interview/assessment/skill test (if any). Applicants are advised to keep their email and phone updated. Selected applicants shall be informed via email/phone about their selection and further process. Panel of weight list candidates will be kept for future vacancies. BECIL shall not be obligated to publish or upload any interim results or stage wise shortlists. Only the final result
comprising the list of candidates selected for the post upon conclusion of the final interview conducted by the client
shall be published on the official website of BECIL.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant post is 30-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Aquaculture or Zoology or Fisheries or Marine Biology from a recognized University or Equivalent to be eligible for the Senior Technical Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Senior Technical Assistant post in this recruitment drive by BECIL.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Technical Assistant post is 32 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Technical Assistant post will receive an approximate salary of Rs. 55,932/- per month, which includes the basic pay and Dearness Allowance (DA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for UR/OBC candidates is Rs 295/-. SC/ST/PWD candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline through Speed Post or online to the specified email address. The application form needs to be filled, and required documents attached, then sent to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications based on eligibility criteria and application fee confirmation, followed by an interview. A merit list will be prepared for shortlisting.

faq.question: Q9. Does BECIL provide any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly detail age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific details on age relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of BECIL, which is www.becil.com. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
